name: Procedure Wise Doctor Report Done
query:
SELECT 
    S.practitioner AS "Requesting Doctor:Data:150:",
    S.performing_practitioner AS "Performing Doctor:Data:150:",
    S.patient AS "Patient ID:Data:100:",
    S.patient_name AS "Patient Name:Data:150:",
    S.procedure_template AS "Service Name:Data:200",
    COUNT(*) AS "QTY:Int:70" ,
    SI.net_amount AS "Amount:Data:70",
    O.appointment_date AS "Scheduled:Date:100",
    S.start_date AS "Completed:Date:100",
    S.status AS "Status:Data:100"
    
FROM 
    `tabClinical Procedure` S , `tabOT Schedule` O, `tabSales Invoice Item` SI


WHERE 
   -- S.status = "Completed"
     S.ot_schedule =  O.name 
     and S.sales_invoice_item = SI.name
     and  S.start_date BETWEEN %(Start_date)s AND %(End_date)s
GROUP BY 
    S.procedure_template, S.status,S.patient_name
ORDER BY 
    S.procedure_template DESC;
